body_txt: This character is an expert, trained in some field where crime-fighting is not a usual goal. They however use this expertise to catch criminals, probably alongside a more conventional Detective Drama hero (i.e., a police officer or private investigator). A Sub-Trope of Amateur Sleuth . If the talent is magic, the character is an Occult Detective . Compare Superhero and The Exotic Detective . Contrast Mundane Utility . See also Mystery Fiction .
